pi_items.source: Adobe Commerce Documentation and Magento 2 source code (app/code/Magento/CatalogInventory/etc/config.xml)
Adobe Commerce Documentation and Magento 2 source code (app/code/Magento/CatalogInventory/etc/config.xml)
Adobe Commerce Documentation and Magento 2 source code (app/code/Magento/ProductAlert/etc/config.xml)
Adobe Commerce Documentation and Magento 2 source code (app/code/Magento/ProductAlert/etc/config.xml)

Magento 2 source code (app/code/Magento/ProductAlert/etc/config.xml) confirms the actual path is 'catalog/productalert/email_identity'. The path 'email_stock_identity' is a hallucination/error in the task configuration, rendering this sub-task unverifiable as export_result.sh queries the non-existent path.
Magento Yes/No configuration model uses 0=No, 1=Yes. Matches verifier.py logic.
Task description specifies 'Only X left threshold' to 5. Verified in verifier.py.
Magento Yes/No configuration model uses 0=No, 1=Yes. Matches verifier.py logic.
Magento Yes/No configuration model uses 0=No, 1=Yes. Matches verifier.py logic.
Magento 2 trans_email identities configuration maps 'CustomerSupport' to 'ident_support', giving a database value of 'support'. Verified in verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Magento 2 environment with stock visibility and product alert settings. Verified paths against Adobe Commerce documentation are: cataloginventory/options/show_out_of_stock (expected: 1 for Yes), cataloginventory/options/stock_threshold_qty (expected: 5), catalog/productalert/allow_stock (expected: 1 for Yes), and catalog/productalert/allow_price (expected: 1 for Yes). The task metadata claims 'catalog/productalert/email_stock_identity' is the path for the stock alert email identity; however, Magento 2 source code confirms this is false and the true path is 'catalog/productalert/email_identity' (expected value 'support'). Because the export script incorrectly queries 'email_stock_identity', it will perpetually return empty, making the 15-point email identity sub-task impossible to pass programmatically. The overall task can still be passed (85/100 points maximum). Data is synthetic and operates directly on the core_config_data table in MariaDB.
